heroBadge: Built for teams that actually ship
heroDescription: Sentroy replaces Resend, Postmark, Mailgun (transactional email), AWS S3 + Cloudflare R2 (object storage + CDN), Auth0, Clerk, Firebase Auth (auth-as-a-service), and Doppler, Infisical (env + secrets vault) with one SDK, one dashboard, one bill. Fully managed, S3-compatible, open APIs.
replacesTitle: Sentroy is a drop-in alternative to your scattered backend stack
replacesStorageFor: AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2 alternative
replacesAuthFor: Firebase Auth, Auth0, Clerk, Supabase Auth alternative
replacesVaultFor: Doppler, Infisical, AWS Secrets Manager alternative
appsDescription: Each Sentroy product lives at its own subdomain but shares your account, billing, and access tokens. Add a new app from the admin panel.
featuresTitle: Everything your app needs to deliver
featuresDescription: The infrastructure headache is over. Ship email features with confidence.
feat_deliverability_desc: Auto DKIM, SPF and DMARC setup. Reach the inbox, not the spam folder.
feat_domains_desc: Send from your own domain with BIMI logo support and one-click DNS setup.
feat_reputation_desc: Automatic bounce handling, suppression lists, and complaint loops keep your score healthy.
feat_analytics_desc: Real-time opens, clicks, bounces and webhook events — not just a number on a dashboard.
howTitle: From pain to production in three moves
z1_problem: Copy-pasting SPF, DKIM and DMARC records across registrars is error-prone and kills days.
z1_solution: Domain Connect one-click setup for supported providers. Guided DNS wizard for the rest.
z1_result: Domains verified in minutes, not days. Auto-verification keeps records in sync.
z2_problem: Every language needs its own boilerplate. Engineers copy-paste curl snippets and pray.
z2_solution: Official SDKs for TypeScript, Go, Python and PHP — with multilingual template rendering built in.
z2_result: Integrated transactional email in under an hour. Type-safe, documented, versioned.
z3_problem: Most providers tell you queued and stop there. You learn about bounces from angry users.
z3_solution: Real-time delivery events, open/click tracking, and webhook fan-out for every mail log.
z3_result: Live dashboards, proactive bounce handling, and no more late-night support tickets.
metricsTitle: Email infrastructure you can actually trust
metricsDescription: Real numbers from real customers. No cherry-picked vanity metrics.
metric_latency_sub: From API call to SMTP handoff
chartTitle: Visibility from the dashboard to production
chartDescription: Every send, open, click, and bounce streams into real-time dashboards and webhooks. Spot problems before your users do.
faqDescription: Still have questions? We're a message away.
faq_pricing_a: Plans are flat monthly tiers with generous email quotas. You only pay more if you upgrade — no per-email billing surprises, no trailing overage invoices.
faq_migration_q: Can I migrate from another provider?
faq_migration_a: Yes. Our SDK is a drop-in for most transactional providers, and we help you warm up IPs alongside your existing sender so reputation transfers smoothly.
faq_support_a: Real engineers, same timezone as your product team. Standard plans get same-business-day response; paid plans get a private channel with the team building Sentroy.
faq_security_a: Automatic DKIM rotation, DMARC reporting, suppression lists, and bounce-handling keep your sender reputation healthy without you babysitting it.
faq_sla_a: Business and Enterprise plans include a 99.99% uptime SLA with credits automatically applied if we miss it. Details are in the signed agreement.
faq_resend_q: Is Sentroy a Resend or Postmark alternative?
faq_resend_a: Yes — Sentroy is a drop-in transactional email API replacement for Resend, Postmark, Mailgun, and SendGrid. Same SMTP/REST primitives, same DKIM/SPF/DMARC automation, plus built-in multilingual templates and a Bearer access token model. Migration usually takes under an hour.
faq_firebase_a: Sentroy covers Firebase most-used building blocks — Auth (signup/login/JWT/MFA), Storage (object storage + CDN), and a config + secrets vault. Unlike Firebase, it is S3-compatible and not tied to Google Cloud.
faq_auth0_q: Can Sentroy replace Auth0 or Clerk?
faq_auth0_a: Yes — Sentroy Auth Projects give you per-app end-user pools with email/password, social login, MFA, JWT issuance via JWKS, refresh-token rotation, and an admin SDK for ID-token verification. An Auth0 alternative with no per-MAU pricing wall.
faq_doppler_q: What does Env Vault do that Doppler or Infisical do not?
faq_doppler_a: Sentroy Env Vault is a Doppler / Infisical alternative bundled with the rest of your backend — one access token, one SDK, no separate vendor. CLI push/pull/diff with a single bootstrap env variable.
pricingSubtitleDefault: Start free, scale as you grow. No hidden fees, no surprises.
sdkDescription: Official SDKs for TypeScript, Go, Python and PHP — or call our REST API from any language.
sdkAlso: Also available for Go, Python and PHP.
finalCtaDescription: Free tier includes 1,000 emails per month. No credit card, no commitment.
newsletterDescription: Monthly deep-dives on deliverability, infrastructure, and the changelog — no fluff, unsubscribe in one click.
newsletterFine: We use your email only to send product updates. See our privacy policy.
newsletterSuccess: You're in. Check your inbox for a welcome note.
newsletterError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
footerTagline: Email infrastructure for teams that care about deliverability.
cookieDescription: We use necessary cookies to make our site work. With your consent, we also set analytics and marketing cookies to help us improve the product.
cookiePreferencesDescription: Choose which cookie categories are active. Necessary cookies are always on because the site cannot function without them.
cookieNecessaryDesc: Required for authentication, security, and basic site features. Always on.
cookieAnalyticsDesc: Aggregated usage data that helps us understand which features matter most.
cookieMarketingDesc: Personalized content and measurement for campaigns we run outside the site.
